title: picea abies f. clanbrassiliana
intro: Picea abies f. clanbrassiliana, also known as the Clanbrassil fir, is a variant of the Norway spruce tree, commonly found in Ireland and the UK. The Clanbrassil fir has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The plant's essential oils and extracts have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of the Clanbrassil fir include essential oil, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to create topical creams, ointments, and teas for medicinal purposes.
